click.prompt: Tiny soft glass tap, like a fingertip on a lantern pane. Extremely short UI click.

hover.prompt: Barely-there high glass shimmer tick, delicate hover cue, almost whispered.

card.prompt: Thick parchment card sliding across stone, faint dry paper scrape with a soft glass edge.

draw.prompt: Quick light card flick from a deck, airy paper whoosh, short and clean.

slash.prompt: Sharp blade whoosh cutting air, thin metallic edge with a brief glass-shard trail.

hit.prompt: Heavy dull body impact thud with a short low punch, fleshy and solid, no scream.

blocked.prompt: Hard clang of steel glancing off a glass-and-metal ward, bright short ricochet.

block.prompt: Protective ward forming: soft crystalline shield bloom with a muted glass chime.

poison.prompt: Smoldering toxic hiss, wet ember spit and low corrosive fizz, sinister and short.

debuff.prompt: Downward dark glass scrape, uneasy falling tone, curse settling into bone.

buff.prompt: Warm rising lantern chime pair, hopeful soft metal-glass sparkle.

heal.prompt: Gentle healing glow: soft ascending glass bells with warm ember breath.

energy.prompt: Quick lantern spark surge, bright rising energy tick with tiny flame pop.

coin.prompt: Two small antique gold coins clinking, bright short metallic sparkle.

potion.prompt: Glass phial uncork and liquid swirl, soft glug with a tiny crystal ping.

death.prompt: Creature collapsing into ash: dry crumbling body fall and soft dust settle.

bigDeath.prompt: Massive elite death: heavy stone-and-ash collapse, deep rumble, glass cracking finale.

turn.prompt: Subtle turn-start cue: soft twin glass chimes, calm and clear.

victory.prompt: Triumphant short fanfare of warm lantern bells and bright glass tones, uplifting but restrained.

defeat.prompt: Somber descending ritual bells, cold and hollow, lantern snuffing out.

relic.prompt: Ancient relic reveal: luminous glass-and-metal chime cascade, sacred and small.

upgrade.prompt: Card upgrade forge spark: bright rising tone with tiny hammer-on-glass ring.

map.prompt: Map node select: soft stone scrape and distant wind through a tower stair.

chip.prompt: Tiny glass facet chip tick, sharp crystalline micro-crack, very short.

shatter.prompt: Dramatic glass shatter burst, many shards exploding outward with a low body thump.

ember.prompt: Single warm ember spark singing upward, soft flame ping.

kindle.prompt: Lantern kindling breath: soft whoosh of flame catching with ember crackle.

stagger.prompt: Dissonant cracked-glass stagger hit, uneasy warble and short stun thud.

art.prompt: Lantern Art cast: radiant glass chord bloom with swirling ember air.

omen.prompt: Deep ominous omen drone swell with distant hollow bells, dark and foreboding.
